name: Capsicum
summary: Pepper species used for topical and metabolic effects.
description: Pepper species used for topical and metabolic effects.
safetyNotes: Generally well tolerated for most users.
contraindications: Broken or inflamed skin for topical use
interactions: Additive skin irritation with other topical rubs
oral products may theoretically compound antihypertensive or anticoagulant regimens

sources.title: Peppers and their constituents against obesity
